site.name: AIoTFun
site.description: Wei Liu — Indie hacker building things at the intersection of AI and IoT. Projects, writing, and works-in-progress.

home.hero_summary: I build small, useful things at the intersection of AI and IoT. Sometimes they ship. Sometimes they teach me something. Either way, I write it down.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Things I have built — shipped products, side experiments, and ongoing tinkering.

writing.title: Writing
writing.subtitle: Notes from building, debugging, and thinking — mostly about AI and embedded hardware.

now.title: Now
now.subtitle: What I am focused on right now.

about.title: About
about.intro_p1: I am an indie hacker building at the intersection of AI and IoT. By day I ship production systems; on the side I tinker with ESP32, voice agents, and anything that looks like it might surprise me when it works.
about.intro_p2: AIoTFun started as a magazine-style site about other people's interesting AIoT discoveries. It has now turned into my own playground — projects I have built, notes from things I have learned, and a permanent home for the side experiments that don't fit anywhere else.
about.intro_p3: If you are hiring, collaborating, or want to swap notes on something I have built, I would love to hear from you.
about.contact_desc: Email is best for serious things, GitHub for code, X for half-baked ideas.

footer.tagline: Built and maintained by Wei Liu.
